grant_title: State to Help Fund Assessment and Remediation Efforts of Blighted Properties
demographic_requirements: None specified; projects must benefit local communities through revitalization and job creation
eligibility_summary: Open to Connecticut municipalities for brownfield assessment, remediation, and redevelopment projects. Funding supports cleanup of toxic and blighted properties to enable new development, housing, retail, or commercial use. Priority given to projects with potential for economic revitalization and smart growth.
